install.note: Ultra-lightweight (<10MB RAM, <1s boot). Run 'picoclaw onboard' after install to initialize.

cli.description: PicoClaw uses cli-oneshot protocol for EchoBird integration. The agent itself runs persistently via 'picoclaw gateway'.
cli.role_mechanism: PicoClaw uses AGENT.md file at ~/.picoclaw/workspace/AGENT.md for system prompt. EchoBird writes role content here; PicoClaw auto-detects changes via mtime tracking.
cli.output_format: Plain text with ANSI color codes and structured log lines. Clean response starts after the lobster emoji delimiter. EchoBird strips ANSI codes, filters log lines, removes <think> blocks, and extracts content after the delimiter.
cli.note: Output contains Go structured logs (HH:MM:SS INF/WRN), ASCII art banner, and <think> reasoning blocks. All are automatically filtered by EchoBird.
